basics.name: Armando Peña Tamayo
basics.label: Full-Stack Engineer | AI Automation & MVP Development
basics.summary: Full‑stack engineer with 8 years of experience building AI‑powered tools, internal dashboards, and fast MVPs for startups using Next.js, Supabase, Node.js, and automated workflows like n8n and OpenAI. I focus on replacing manual operations with automation to reduce costs, improve efficiency, and deliver measurable business impact.

caseStudies.title: AI Email Automation System
caseStudies.challenge: The team was spending dozens of hours per week on manual email processing: extracting structured data, organizing files, tagging messages, and responding to repetitive requests. This created bottlenecks, human errors, and delayed operations.
caseStudies.solution: Designed and implemented a complete AI-powered automation system using n8n workflows integrated with OpenAI. The solution automatically processes incoming emails, extracts relevant data, stores information in Supabase and SharePoint, and provides a real-time React dashboard for monitoring and exceptions.
results: Reduced manual processing time by approximately 70%
Eliminated repetitive inbox tasks, freeing the team for high-value work
Improved data accuracy and reduced human error
Achieved fast ROI through operational efficiency gains

caseStudies.title: AI Document Generation System for Insurance
caseStudies.challenge: Creating customized insurance documents was a highly manual process that took several hours per policy. This caused delays in client service, inconsistencies, and limited the team's capacity to handle growing volume.
caseStudies.solution: Built an intelligent document generation platform that ingests client data and business rules to automatically produce accurate, personalized documents. Integrated with existing systems for seamless workflow.
results: Reduced document creation time from hours to minutes (80% faster)
Significantly improved consistency and compliance across documents
Enabled the team to scale operations without additional headcount
Enhanced client experience through faster turnaround

caseStudies.title: AI + AR Virtual Tailoring Platform
caseStudies.challenge: Traditional body measurement and clothing try-on processes were slow, inaccurate, and created high return rates in e-commerce. The client needed a fast, engaging digital solution to improve conversion and user experience.
caseStudies.solution: Developed a mobile-first web application that uses device camera input for body measurements combined with Augmented Reality for virtual try-on. Delivered a complete MVP with robust backend and smooth frontend experience.
results: Delivered a production-ready MVP in just 4 months
Reduced time-to-market by approximately 50% compared to standard timelines
Enabled virtual try-on functionality that improves customer engagement
Positioned the client for lower return rates and higher conversions

work.name: AI Email Automation System
work.summary:
Replaced a manual email workflow with an AI automation system using n8n and OpenAI. Automatically processes emails, extracts structured data, organizes files, and tags messages.

Estimated impact: reduced manual processing time by ~70% and eliminated repetitive inbox operations.

work.name: AI + AR Virtual Tailoring Platform
work.summary:

Delivered a full MVP in 4 months, reducing time-to-market by ~50% compared to typical product timelines.

work.name: AI Document Generation System (Insurance)

Developed an AI system for automatic document generation in the insurance domain.

Reduced document creation time from hours to minutes (~80% faster) by replacing manual workflows with AI.

Consistently delivered complete solutions from idea to production.

projects.name: adev-lru
projects.description:
Lightweight and highly efficient LRU Cache library for JavaScript and TypeScript.

Published on NPM with support for persistence (LocalStorage + IndexedDB), TTL, and O(1) operations.

projects.name: tkt
projects.description: Blazing-fast Go CLI that turns TODO comments into tickets, auto-manages git branches, tracks time, and integrates with Neovim.

projects.name: Collaborative Whiteboard
projects.description: Low-bandwidth real-time collaborative drawing application optimized for unstable networks and Apple Pencil.

projects.name: Life Simulation
projects.description: Neuroevolution simulation combining Neural Networks and Genetic Algorithms. Virtual creatures evolve behaviors to survive in a dynamic environment.
